certificate.issued_by: Guardian Agent — Agentic Zero Pioneer Team

eu_ai_act.risk_rationale: Process involves AI interaction with users
requirements: Inform users they are interacting with AI

gaps: No explicit AI risk assessment or impact assessment processes aligned with ISO 42001
Missing documented human oversight and accountability mechanisms for AI-driven decisions
Lack of transparency/explainability requirements for root cause outputs and data handling
No provisions for AI-specific continual improvement, bias monitoring, or model performance evaluation
recommendations: Integrate ISO 42001 Clause 6 risk and impact assessment into escalation rules and 8D cycles
Add mandatory human-in-the-loop checkpoints and decision logging for all AI capabilities
Implement explainability features in report generation and data-driven verification steps
Define AI-specific KPIs for model drift, fairness, and data quality within the existing KPI enforcement

issues: Personal data detected: define lawful basis for processing
Data minimization: ensure only necessary data is processed
Retention policy: define how long data is retained

certificate.notes: Guardian review completed. Risk level: limited. Quality: 100%

remediation_plan: ISO 42001: No explicit AI risk assessment or impact assessment processes aligned with ISO 42001
GDPR: Personal data detected: define lawful basis for processing
